title: ★突發 連登原來有隱藏腦魔icon！！！！！！

replies.msg:
原來只要將#xxxxx#lme改做正確嘅字母就會出現隱藏腦魔icon


例如下面咁:
#origin#lme
#kill#lme
#hi#lme
#eat#lme
#eating#lme
#tongue#lme
#saliva#lme
#jable#lme
#lick#lme
#try#lme
#in#lme
#dllm#lme
#silly#lme
#pointing#lme
#boom#lme
#brain#lme
#pointingL#lme
#pointingR#lme
#hoho#lme
#haha#lme
#seeNoEvil#lme
#photo#lm
#v#lme
#hold#lme
#fuck#lm
#hate#lme

#psyche#lme
#NoEyesSee#lme
#good#lme
#ok#lme

#sad#lme

#dust#lme
#thinking#lme
#wtf#lme

都幾正喎
